question: Counter-Strike: Passion UA vs Wildcard (BO3) - IEM Atlanta: American Qualifier Playoffs
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between Passion UA and Wildcard in the IEM Atlanta: American Qualifier Playoffs, scheduled for February 12 at 8:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Passion UA" if Passion UA win the match against Wildcard.

This market will resolve to "Wildcard" if Wildcard win the match against Passion UA.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org/.

question: Honor of Kings: Royal Never Give Up vs EDward Gaming - Game 4 Winner
description:
This market refers to the Honor of Kings match between Royal Never Give Up and EDward Gaming in the King Pro League Stage 2 Group B, scheduled for February 12 at 1:05AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Royal Never Give Up" if Royal Never Give Up win Game 4 against EDward Gaming.

This market will resolve to "EDward Gaming" if EDward Gaming win Game 4 against Royal Never Give Up.

If the match begins but is not completed, and Game 4 is concluded with a winner determined, this market will resolve based on the completed Game 4. 

If Game 4 is not completed for any reason, this market will resolve 50-50. 

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without play beginning, this market will resolve 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.huya.com/660002.

events.title: Honor of Kings: Royal Never Give Up vs EDward Gaming (BO5) - King Pro League Stage 2 Group B
events.description:
This market refers to the Honor of Kings match between Royal Never Give Up and EDward Gaming in the King Pro League Stage 2 Group B, scheduled for February 12 at 1:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Royal Never Give Up" if Royal Never Give Up win the match against EDward Gaming.

This market will resolve to "EDward Gaming" if EDward Gaming win the match against Royal Never Give Up.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/honorofkings/Main_Page.

question: Total Kills Over/Under 28.5 in Game 1?
description:
In the upcoming match between BNK FEARX and DN SOOPers in the LCK Cup Playoffs, scheduled for February 12 at 3:00AM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 1.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 1 is 29 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

events.title: LoL: BNK FEARX vs DN Freecs (BO5) - LCK Cup Playoffs
events.description:
This market refers to the LoL match between BNK FEARX and DN Freecs in the LCK Cup Playoffs, scheduled for February 12 at 3:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "BNK FEARX" if BNK FEARX win the match against DN Freecs.

This market will resolve to "DN Freecs" if DN Freecs win the match against BNK FEARX.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/leagueoflegends/Main_Page.

description:

Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream BTC/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

description:

question: LoL: Movistar KOI Fénix vs FALKE Esports (BO1) - LES Kick-off Group A
description:
This market refers to the LoL match between Movistar KOI Fénix and FALKE Esports in the LES Kick-off Group A, scheduled for February 13 at 6:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Movistar KOI Fénix" if Movistar KOI Fénix win the match against FALKE Esports.

This market will resolve to "FALKE Esports" if FALKE Esports win the match against Movistar KOI Fénix.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/leagueoflegends/Main_Page.

question: Total Kills Over/Under 34.5 in Game 2?
description:
In the upcoming match between BNK FEARX and DN SOOPers in the LCK Cup Playoffs, scheduled for February 12 at 3:00AM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 2.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 2 is 35 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

question: Total Kills Over/Under 36.5 in Game 2?
description:
In the upcoming match between BNK FEARX and DN SOOPers in the LCK Cup Playoffs, scheduled for February 12 at 3:00AM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 2.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 2 is 37 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

events.title: LoL: BNK FEARX vs DN Freecs (BO5) - LCK Cup Playoffs
events.description:
This market refers to the LoL match between BNK FEARX and DN Freecs in the LCK Cup Playoffs, scheduled for February 12 at 3:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "BNK FEARX" if BNK FEARX win the match against DN Freecs.

This market will resolve to "DN Freecs" if DN Freecs win the match against BNK FEARX.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/leagueoflegends/Main_Page.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - February 13, 5:25AM-5:30AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the Bitcoin price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the BTC/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/btc-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream BTC/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.
